headline: National Veterinary Associates Welcomes Laura Tortorella and Tina Hunt, PhD, to Board of Directors
summary: National Veterinary Associates (NVA), a leading pet healthcare services company, today announced the appointment of Laura Tortorella, Chief Executive Officer of AccentCare, and Tina Hunt, PhD, former Executive Vice President of IDEXX Laboratories, to its Board, effective immediately.
